spec.name: The Kitchen
spec.description: Your footsteps echo off the stone tiles of the kitchen. On the south wall you see the large fire place and a huge copper pot bubbling merrily. The chef is busy chopping up greens and other vegetables at the wooden table for tonight's meal. Servants scurry about grabbing utensils and preparing fresh hares. A small door leads out into the hall northward and the doorway to the dining hall is west.
